snippet.title: EPIC - Teaser | Anand Deverakonda, Vaishnavi Chaitanya | Hesham AW | Naga Vamsi S | Aditya Hasan
snippet.description:
A beautifully crafted love story that captures the essence of everyday life and relationships ❤️

Here's EPIC Teaser. In Cinemas Very Soon.

CAST & CREW
Starring: Anand Deverakonda, Vaishnavi Chaitanya
Writer & Director: Aditya Haasan
Produced by: Suryadevara Naga Vamsi & Sai Soujanya
Music: Hesham Abdul Wahab
Cinematographer : Azeem Mohammad
Editing: Navin Nooli
Production designer: Avinash kolla 
Choreographer: Leelavathi
Costume designers: Sandhya Sabbavarapu
Executive Producer: Phani K Varma
Co-Producers: Venkat Upputuri - VMR
Line producer: CH Ramakrishna Reddy 
Production Controler: Karuturi Suryanarayana
Production executive: Pallamreddy Vinodreddy
Art directors: Dheeraj Ponugoti, Prakeerthi Uppalapati 
Co-Director: Gopala Raju (Gopi)
Chief associate directors: Dheeraj Vijay Asrani
Direction Department: Dwarakesh, C.Arjun reddy,Sirisha Andavolu, Harsha vejendla, Agasthya Dantuluri, 
Camera operator: Ashok Seepally
Associate cinematographer: D. Bhargav Chakravarthy, Shashank Kumar Singh
UK Cinematography Team: Abhed Parab, Pooja Sawhney, Parth Chauhan, Sushrut Koche
Online editor: Santhosh Kiran Billakurti
Associate editors: Santhosh Kiran
Billakurti, Anushaa Boga,Thallapelli Pavan Goud
V.F.X : Deccan dreams
Studio head :- k madan
Sr sup & head of production :- anil kumar telikepalli
Vfx supervisor:- raviteja karasala
DI: Annapurna Studios
Tech Head: C.V Rao
Colorist: Ayush
Final Mix: Arvind Menon & Team
Audio on Aditya music

Epic Teaser Music Credits
Composed Produced and Arranged by Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Lyrics:Sri Harsha 
Vocals: Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Guitars and Bass: Sumesh Parameshwar.
Mixed and Mastered by Harishankar V at Aural Alchemy.
Mix Assisted by Santom jose and Azhar Thaju.
HW Sessions Managed by Vichuuuh Praboa.
Special Thanks to Ayshath Safa.


► Subscribe: http://youtube.com/SitharaEntertainments
► Like: https://facebook.com/SitharaEntertainments
► Follow: http://instagram.com/SitharaEntertainments
► Follow: https://twitter.com/SitharaEnts

snippet.title: Introducing PREETHI | South Queen Trisha | Suriya's Karuppu | RJ Balaji | @SaiAbhyankkar
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Jai Shivrai | Raja Shivaji | Marathi | Riteish D | Ajay – Atul | In Cinemas 1 May
snippet.description:
जय शिवराय ही ललकारी घुमणार, छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांचा जयघोष होणार! 🚩

तुम्हां सर्वांच्या आग्रहास्तव महाराष्ट्र दिनानिमित्त सादर करीत आहोत 'जय शिवराय' व्हिडिओ साँग 🔥

आत्ताच आपलं तिकीट बुक करा! (U/A 16+) (मराठी आणि हिंदी)

‘हिंदवी स्वराज्याचे संस्थापक’ 🚩
छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांच्या प्रेरणादायी जीवनावर आधारित ‘राजा शिवाजी’ 

उद्यापासून आपल्या जवळच्या चित्रपटगृहात प्रदर्शित!

Jio Studios Presents 
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed By: Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande 
Produced By: Genelia Deshmukh
Music Composed, Arranged, Conducted, Produced By: Ajay – Atul
Choreographer: Remo D’Souza
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)

Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi & Hindi
 
In Cinemas
1st May 2026

snippet.title: Sing Geetham Official Teaser | Singeetham Srinivasa Rao | Nag Ashwin | Devi Sri Prasad | June 11
snippet.description:
Presenting the official teaser of #SingGeetham. In cinemas JUNE 11th, 2026.

𝐋𝐞𝐭’𝐬 𝐒𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐆𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐦… 🎶

#SSR61 is titled 'Sing Geetham'.

A story that has been waiting to unfold for 40 years…
A cinematic experience like never before is finally here! 🔥

Worldwide Theatrical Release On June 11th...

Director: Singeetham Srinivasa Rao
Producer: Nag Ashwin
Music Director: Devi Sri Prasad
Executive Director: Sankalp Gora
Lyricist: Shree Mani
Cinematographer: Ankur C
Production Designer: Aravind Mule
Additional Production Designer: Prakeerthi Uppalapati
Executive Producer: Geetha Gautham
Writers: Singeetham Srinivasa Rao, Gautami Challagulla, Shashank Chintalpudi & Rathna Sreekar, Nanda Kishore Emani, Rahul V Rajeshwar

#JETLEE ready for takeoff in cinemas worldwide from May 1st 💥

Cast: Satya, Rhea Singha, Vennela Kishore, Ajay and others.

#JetleeTrailer #Satya #RheaSingha #VennelaKishore #RiteshRana #KaalaBhairava #ClapEntertainment #MythriMovieMakers

Crew :
Directed by Ritesh Rana
Produced by Clap Entertainment (Chiranjeevi (Cherry) and Hemalatha Pedamallu)

Posters : Shyam

அபூர்வா ஆடியோ பக்தியுடன் வழங்கும் எமபயத்தையும் மரணபயத்தையும் போக்கி நம்மை காக்கும் சித்ரகுப்தர் கவசம் சித்ரா பௌர்ணமியில் மறக்காமல் கேளுங்கள்

Chitraguptar Kavasam Tamil Devotional Song on Lord Chitragupta, Sung & Composed By Veeramani Kannan & Lyrics by Senkathirvanan, Produced by Apoorva Audios

snippet.title: Sattendru Maarudhu Vaanilai - Trailer | Jai | Yogi Babu | Babu Vijay | Meenakshi G | Girishh G
snippet.description:

In Cinemas Worldwide from 15th May 2026.

snippet.title: Buddha Paurnima Special Top 10 Geet | बुद्ध पौर्णिमा विशेष | Audio Jukebox | T-Series Bhakti Marathi
snippet.description:
@TSeriesBhaktiMarathi Presents:-  Buddha Paurnima Special Top 10 Geet | बुद्ध पौर्णिमा विशेष | Audio Jukebox | Buddha Geet | Buddha Paurnima Geet
#BuddhaPournima #BuddhaGeet #TSeriesBhaktiMarathi 

Celebrate the divine occasion of Buddha Pournima with this peaceful and inspiring collection of Top 10 Geete, dedicated to the teachings of भगवान गौतम बुद्ध and the path of peace, wisdom, and compassion.

♫   TRACKLIST♫            
► Aaj Vaishakhi Pornima ◄ 0:00:00
► Gautama Tucha Majhya ◄ 0:06:10
► Vandan Geet Gaato ◄ 0:13:10
► Buddh Mhanale Etuke ◄ 0:17:54
► Pimplachaya Panavar ◄ 00:22:32
► Kaaljaat Buddha Korla ◄ 0:28:07
► Jahali Pahaat ◄ 0:33:54
► Sukh Milel Buddha Viharaat ◄ 0:40:02
► Buddha Vandana Karu ◄ 0:45:16
► Ajramar Buddhache Naav ◄ 00:50:59
-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

This soulful Audio Jukebox brings together devotional and motivational songs that reflect the values of truth, equality, humanity, and enlightenment. Each song inspires listeners to follow the path of peace and mindfulness shown by Lord Buddha.

Song Details:
Song: Aaj Vaishakhi Pornima
Album: Pimplachya Panavar

@TSeriesBhaktiMarathi Presents:-  Buddha Paurnima Special Top 10 Geet | बुद्ध पौर्णिमा विशेष | Audio Jukebox | Buddha Geet | Buddha Paurnima Geet
#BuddhaPournima #BuddhaGeet #TSeriesBhaktiMarathi 

Celebrate the divine occasion of Buddha Pournima with this peaceful and inspiring collection of Top 10 Geete, dedicated to the teachings of भगवान गौतम बुद्ध and the path of peace, wisdom, and compassion.

♫   TRACKLIST♫            
► Aaj Vaishakhi Pornima ◄ 0:00:00
► Gautama Tucha Majhya ◄ 0:06:10
► Vandan Geet Gaato ◄ 0:13:10
► Buddh Mhanale Etuke ◄ 0:17:54
► Pimplachaya Panavar ◄ 00:22:32
► Kaaljaat Buddha Korla ◄ 0:28:07
► Jahali Pahaat ◄ 0:33:54
► Sukh Milel Buddha Viharaat ◄ 0:40:02
► Buddha Vandana Karu ◄ 0:45:16
► Ajramar Buddhache Naav ◄ 00:50:59
-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

This soulful Audio Jukebox brings together devotional and motivational songs that reflect the values of truth, equality, humanity, and enlightenment. Each song inspires listeners to follow the path of peace and mindfulness shown by Lord Buddha.

snippet.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizilbash

Executive Producers:
Oliver Berben
Victor Hadida
Richard Wright
Robert Bernacci

Cast:
Austin Abrams
Zach Cherry
Kali Reis
and Paul Walter Hauser

Credits not final

This film is not yet rated by The Motion Picture Association. For future rating information, please visit www.filmratings.com.  

#ResidentEvil #ResidentEvilMovie #ZachCregger #SonyPictures #OfficialTrailer #AustinAbrams #ZachCherry #KaliReis #PaulWalterHauser

snippet.title: #Video - बिना मौगीये जीवन कट जैते | #Ashish Yadav, Srishti Bharti का एक और बवाल - #New Magahi Song
snippet.description:
Subscribe करने के लिए क्लिक करें 👉 - http://goo.gl/ip2lbk

आप सब इस गाने का Reels बनाए - Make Your Reels :- https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/2016709282527477/

►Song - Bin Maugiye Jiwan Kat Jaite
►Singer - Aashish Yadav, Srishti Bharti
►Featuring - Sona Singh, Juli Singh Rajput
►Lyrics - Chintu Raja
►Music Director - Pappu Bhai
►Video Director - Goldi Jaiswal, Satish Rai
►Company/ Label - Wave Music 
►Digital Marketing - Lokdhun 
►Whatsapp - 9718776677
►VG - 45634

♪ Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/album/68sbbnZns46c6Fa6WUFmQM?si=VK3UD29BQ02fsgcFkEWSmA
♪ Gaana :  
♪ Jio Saavn : https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/bin-maugiye-jiwan-kat-jaite/JSoNBgVmAlA
♪ Apple Music :  https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=6EWGRCi6UK0&si=0jkXjpTEwwga1uYk
♪ Amazon Prime Music : https://music.amazon.com/tracks/B0GZ4V1YRB?marketplaceId=ATVPDKIKX0DER&musicTerritory=US&ref=dm_sh_DV5HNG9pS1Y6YC0ku9OHHYGfo
♪ YouTube Music :  
♪ Instagram Reels :  https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/2016709282527477/
♪ Spotify Playlist : https://open.spotify.com/user/31wrrqxq4vi7pg57rnkxcna4tcqu? 

Connected with us !
👉 Follow us on Instagram :- https://www.instagram.com/wavemusic/
👉 Like us on Facebook :- https://www.facebook.com/WaveMusicIndiaofficial
👉Join Us on Whtsapp :- https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VacuoR1GpLHNjsDWYd2R
👉 Follow us on X ( Twitter ) :- https://x.com/WaveMusicWM?t=kKhpZOhFiLqswaThplIGBg&s=08 

मुखड़ा 
F - अरे हमर वियाह के बाद तुहूँ वियाह करले 
 देतो काल से चूमा के हम देबो आज भरले 

M - तू त सनम गे पैभी बलम गे हमर करेजवा फट जैते 
तोर दु दु बहिन देतो एक एक दिन बिन मौगियो जीवन कट जैते 

अंतरा -1
M - बड़ी टेन्सन है लैला पे बीबी गे उ त खोजते कूलर टीवी गे 
अभी एको रुपैया कमाईये नय कहाँ से छटाईवे ओकर हिपी गे 

F - भाड़ा पर के माल से रे दिन कटतो कबले 
मन भरतो नय मौगी के हाथ से खैभी जबले 

M - लेबो तोर नाम गे कर दे ई काम गे हमरो दुख बाँट जैते 
तोर दु दु बहिन देतो एक एक दिन बिन मौगियो जीवन कट जैते

अंतरा -2
M - छौड़ी दुख के बुझते हमर गे लूटभी तो पिया संग लहर गे 
दोनों बहिन तोर सुपर डुपर हऊ देदे दोनों में कौनो के नंबर गे 

F - अपना चक्कर में बहिन के मोर बिगाड़ देभी रे 
माजा हमरे जैसे ओकरो से तो मार लेभी रे 

M - नंदन आशीष के देभी तो किस गे चिंटू राजा तरस जैते
तोर दु दु बहिन देतो एक एक दिन बिन मौगियो जीवन कट जैते

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars 😱🔥 कौन बचेगा?
snippet.description:
आज की इस 🔴 LIVE स्ट्रीम में हम Grand Theft Auto V के अंदर एक जबरदस्त एक्सपेरिमेंट करने वाले हैं!

🚗💥 100 लग्ज़री गाड़ियों को रेलवे ट्रैक पर खड़ा किया गया है
🚆 और सामने से आ रही है फुल स्पीड ट्रेन!

😱 क्या ये महंगी गाड़ियाँ ट्रेन को रोक पाएंगी?
या फिर सब कुछ हो जाएगा चकनाचूर?

👉 LIVE में जुड़ो और देखो कौन सी कार सबसे ज्यादा स्ट्रॉन्ग है!

snippet.title: अनमोल पुराने फ़िल्मी गाने | Old Hindi Gaane | Purane Gaane | Filmi Gaane | Anmol Gaane
snippet.description:
अनमोल पुराने फ़िल्मी गाने | Old Hindi Gaane | Purane Gaane | Filmi Gaane | Anmol Gaane

कोई शहरी बाबू
फिरकी वाली तू कल फिर आना
चल सन्यासी मंदिर में
शीशी भरी गुलाब की
बिंदिया चमकेगी
मैं जट यमला पगला दीवाना
चना जोर गरम
पूछे जो कोई मुझसे
आने से उसके आए बहार
अठरा बरस की तू होने को आई
मुझे इश्क है तुझी से
तुमने किसी की जान को
तारीफ करूं क्या उसकी
कितनी जवां है जिंदगी
ये तेरी सादगी
दिल खुश है आज
दिल बेकरार सा है
हमीं से मोहब्बत, हमीं से लड़ाई
पहले मिले थे सपनों में
मैं प्यार का दीवाना

snippet.title: One Night Only | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
what would you do if you only had one night?

watch the trailer for one night only now. only in theaters august 7.
-----
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/onenightonlymovie 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@onenightonlymovie
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/onenightonlymovie
X: https://www.twitter.com/1nightonlymovie  
Official Site: https://onenightonlymovie.com

What if one messy night turns out to be the best thing that ever happened to you? 

This summer, Will Gluck, the filmmaker of Anyone but You and Easy A, celebrates modern romantic comedy on the big screen with a fresh, witty, swoony original film about searching for love on the least romantic night of the year. 

Academy Award® nominee Monica Barbaro (A Complete Unknown, Top Gun: Maverick) and BAFTA nominee Callum Turner (Masters of the Air, Fantastic Beasts franchise) star as Allie and Owen, two love-starved strangers who crash into each other in an ever-so-slightly fictionalized New York City on the one night of the year when single people are allowed to have sex.

Recently dumped Owen and hopeful romantic Allie might be the only two singles in the city looking for more than just a quick encounter. They both feel a spark when they meet, but a series of missteps and side quests complicate their night, keeping them apart. As they each race toward and away from each other across the city, they just might discover that the one thing they want most is closer than they think.

The film’s electrifying cast includes Maya Hawke (Stranger Things), Julia Fox (Uncut Gems), indie pop sensation King Princess (Nine Perfect Strangers), Ben Marshall (Saturday Night Live), Ziwe (Baited with Ziwe), and screen legends Molly Ringwald and Levar Burton.

One Night Only is co-written, directed and produced by Will Gluck, based on a script from Travis Braun. The film is produced by Will Gluck through his company Olive Bridge Entertainment, and by Olive Bridge VP Jacqueline Monetta (exec producer, Anyone but You).

snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Movie: Kismat Konnection
Singer(s): Atif Aslam, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Pritam
Lyricist: Sayeed Quadri

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Ramesh S. Taurani
Director: Aziz Mirza
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Vidya Balan, Juhi Chawla, Vishal Malhotra, Om Puri, Boman Irani

Song Lyrics:

O Oo O Hoo
Hoooo
Aaaaaa
Tumhi Ehaashon Mein 
Tumhi Jazbaaton Mein 
Tumhi Lamhaton Mein 
Tumhi Din Raaton Mein

Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Har Jagah Tumhi Ho
Haan Mein Dekhon Jahan Jab
Us Jagah Tumhi Ho
Yeh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Woh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Is Zameen Se Falak Ke Darmiyan Tumhi Ho
Tum Hi Ho Beshubaar 
Tum Hi Hoo
Tum Hi Ho Mujhe Mein Haan
Tum Hi Ho Tum Hi Ho
Oooooo Ooo Oooo O Oo O O O Oo

Kaise Batayein Tumhein Aur Kis Tarah Yeh 
Kitna Tumhein Hum Chahtein Hai 
Saya Bhi Tera Dikhe To Paas Jaake 
Usmein Simat Hum Jaate Hain
Rasta Tumhi Ho Rehnuma Tumhi Ho
Jiski Khwaaish Hai Humko
Woh Panah Tumhi Ho

Tum Hi Ho Besuba

Tum Hi Ho Mujh Mein Haan
Tum Hi Ho

Labzz Woh Saare

Imtihan Tumhi Ho

Aur Wajah Tumhi Ho

snippet.title: Milo Na Tum To Hum Ghabraye   Lata Mangeshkar   Golden Era Song
snippet.description:
#90sStyle #HindiSong #SadSong
:- Artist - Dev Fi & Dopali Bhardwaj
 :- Music - Prabhakar Kumar 
 :- Lyrics - Dev Raj
 :- Publisher - KME Network
📧 Email Contact - tcgmediagrouptmg@gmail.com
💬 WhatsApp: +91 7058450904

दिल को छू जाने वाला ये खूबसूरत गाना “मिलो ना तुम तो हम घबराएं” एक गहरी मोहब्बत और तड़प की कहानी बयान करता है। जब प्यार सच्चा होता है, तो दूरियां भी बेचैन कर देती हैं — यही एहसास इस गाने के हर शब्द और हर सुर में झलकता है। ❤️

इस गाने में एक ऐसे दिल की बात कही गई है जो अपने प्यार के बिना अधूरा है। मिलन की चाह, जुदाई का डर और दिल की बेचैनी को बेहद भावुक अंदाज़ में पेश किया गया है।

✨ अगर आपने कभी सच्चा प्यार किया है, तो ये गाना आपके दिल को जरूर छू जाएगा।

🎧 Credits:
Singer: Sonu Raj
Music: Sonu Music
Lyrics Dev Raj

📌 अगर आपको ये गाना पसंद आए तो:
👍 Like करें
💬 Comment करें
🔔 Channel को Subscribe करना न भूलें

snippet.title: O Jaane Jaan Main Haseen - Haqeeqat Movie Song | Ajay Devgan & Tabu | Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Singer(s): Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Dilip Sen Sameer Sen
Lyricist: Gulshan Bawra

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tips Films, N. R. Pachisia
Director: Kuku Kohli
Cast: Ajay Devgan, Tabu, Amrish Puri, Johnny Lever, Aruna Irani 

Song Lyrics:

O Jaane Jaan Tu Haseen Main Jawaan
O Jaane Jaan Tu Haseen Main Jawaan
Meri Ankhon Se Ojhal Ho Tu 
Kabhi Aye Na Aisa Sama
O Saajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan
O Saajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan
Meri Ankho Se Ojhal Ho Tu
Kabhi Aye Na Aisa Sama
O Jaane Jaan Tu Haseen Main Jawaan
O Sajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan

Sunke Tere Chude Ki Khanak 
Dil Kaise Sambhalu Tu Hi Abta
Mathe Pe Mere Tum Bindiya Banke 
Yu Hi Chamkate Rahna Sada
Ek Rath Ke Ham Do Pahiye Hai
Chalta Hi Rahe Karwa
O Sajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan
O Janejaa Tu Haseen Main Jawaan

Chota Sa Hoga Sansar Apna
Milke Sahenge Sukh Dukh Sabhi
Rasme Nibhayenge Kasme Nibhayenge
Ye Pyar Kam Na Hoga Kabhi
Armano Ka Har Phul Khile 
Ye Bahare Rahe Meharbaa
O Janejaa Tu Haseen Main Jawaan
O Sajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan
Meri Ankho Se Ojhal Ho Tu
Kabhi Aye Na Aisa Sama
O Jaane Jaan Tu Haseen Main Jawaan
O Sajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan

snippet.title: Epigrotive Pro Scrims Day -1 | FT. #Apexgaming #godlike #soul #8bit #rntx
snippet.description:
🔥 EPIGROTIVE PRO SCRIMS | QUALIFIERS (ONLINE) 🔥
🏆 India’s Pro BGMI Esports Showdown 🏆

The snowstorm has arrived — and only the strongest will survive.

Welcome to the Qualifiers of Epigrotive Pro Scrims, powered by Epigrotive Gaming, where India’s top professional BGMI teams battle it out for dominance, glory, and a ticket to the Grand Finals.

This is not a casual lobby.
This is high-stakes BGMI esports at its absolute peak.

🗓️ QUALIFIERS SCHEDULE

• Dates: 1st & 2nd MAY 2026
• Match Time: 1:00 PM IST onwards
• Game: Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI)
• Mode: Online
• Format: Round Robin
• Total Teams: 27
• Groups: 3 (9 teams each)
• Matches: 12 Total | 8 Matches per Team (4 per day)

🎯 Qualification Rule:
 Top 18 teams qualify for the Grand Finals

 DAY-WISE MATCH SCHEDULE (DAY 1 – 01/05/2026)

Maps Rotation: Erangel & Miramar

🔹 Match 1: Group A 🆚 Group B – Erangel
🔹 Match 2: Group A 🆚 Group B – Miramar
🔹 Match 3: Group A 🆚 Group C – Erangel
🔹 Match 4: Group A 🆚 Group C – Miramar
🔹 Match 5: Group B 🆚 Group C – Erangel
🔹 Match 6: Group B 🆚 Group C – Miramar

🏆OFFICIAL GROUPS – SEMI FINALS
🔥 GROUP A
iQOO Soul
Godlike Esports
iQOO 8Bit
Vasista Esports
Madkings
Troy Tamilan Esports 
Quantam Spark
4TR Official 
Team Zero Official

🔥 GROUP B
iQOO Revenant X Spark
Wyld Fangs
K9 Esports 
Nebula Esports 
Myth Official
Vanguard Esports 
NoNx Esports 
Welt Esports 
Team Warriors Of God

🔥 GROUP C
Team Apex Gaming
iQOO Orangutan 
Victores Sumus
Team Omega
Meta Ninza
Bloody Sweet Esports 
iQOO Team Tamilas
AutoBotz Esports 
Rising Esports

🏆 WHAT’S ON THE LINE?

 Grand Finals Qualification
Legacy, reputation & bragging rights
Proof of being among India’s BGMI elite

Every rotation matters.
Every point matters.

📺 WATCH LIVE & SUPPORT YOUR TEAM

🎥 Live Stream: Epigrotive Pro Scrims
🕔 Time: 1:00 PM IST onwards

📺 Catch all the action LIVE and witness the rise of the next champions.

Join Epigrotive Gaming Discord Server - https://discord.gg/ejajtGymDw

snippet.title: ये गलियां ये चौबारा 💖 | Lata Mangeshkar | Padmini Kolhapure, Rishi Kapoor | Prem Rog Movie Songs
snippet.description:
Enjoy Bollywood romantic, evergreen & latest Hindi songs in stunning HDR & 4K quality with crystal clear sound ❤️

Song Name: Yeh Galiyan Yeh Chaubara 
Singer Name: Lata Mangeshkar
Movie: Prem Rog (1982)
Music Director: Lakshmikant - Pyarelal
Lyrics: Santosh Anand

Lyrics - 

Yeh galiyan yeh chaubara
Yaha aana na dobaara
Yeh galiyan eh chaubara
Yaha aana na dobaara
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Leja rang birangi yaaden
Hasne rone ki buniyaaden
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi


Mere haathon mein
Bhari bhari choodiyan
Mujhe bha gayi
Hari hari choodiyan
Dekh milti hain
Teri meri choodiyan
Tere jaisi saheli
Mere choodiyan
Tune peesee woh
Mehndi rang layi
Meri gori hatheli rach aayi
Teri aankh kyoon laado bhar aayi
Tere ghar pe bajeghi shahenayi
Sawan mein badal se kehna
Pardes mein hain meri behna
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi


Aa maaen milne gale
Chale hum sasural chale
Tere angan mein apna
Bas bachpan chod chale
Kal bhi suraj niklega
Kal bhi panchhi gayenge
Sab tujhko dikhayi denge
Par hum na nazar ayenge
Aanchal mein sanjo lena humko
Sapnon mein bula lena humko
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi


Dekh too naa humein bhulaana
Mana door humein hai jaana
Meri alhad si ankheliyaan
Sada palkon bhi basaanaa
Jab bajne lage baje gaaje
Jag lagne lage khali khali
Us dam tu itna samajhna
Meri doli uthi hai phoolon wali
Thode din ke yeh naate
The kabhi hanste the gate the
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Yeh galiyan yeh chaubara
Yaha aana na dobaara
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi.

सुन्दरकांड” – श्री राम चरित मानस का 5 वा अध्याय/कांड है। सुन्दर कांड (Sundar Kand) को सबसे पहले रामायण में श्री वाल्मीकि जी ने संस्कृत में लिखा था। बाद में तुलसी दस जी ने जब श्री राम चरित मानस लिखी, तो सुन्दर कांड का अवधी भाषा वाला रूप हम सब के सामने आया 
सुन्दरकाण्ड में हनुमान जी का सीता माता को खोजने के लिए की गयी लंका यात्रा का सम्पूर्ण मनमोहक बखान किया गया है।
सुन्दरकांड एक ऐसा भाग है जो सिर्फ हनुमान जी की वीरता का बखान करता है । सुन्दर कांड हनुमान जी पर केंद्रित सबसे पुरानी रचना है। ऐसा माना जाता है के सुन्दरकाण्ड के पाठ से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती हैं ।

सुन्दर कांड के फायदे | Benefits of - Sunder Kand
 यह कहा जाता है कि चालीस सप्ताह तक लगातार जो कोई श्रद्धापूर्वक Sundarkand का पाठ करता है, तो उसके सभी मनोरथ पूरे होते हैं तथा जीवन के सभी कष्ट, दुःख, परेशानियाँ दूर हो जाती हैँ । कई ज्योतिषी भी विपरित परिस्थितियों में सुंदरकांड करने की ही सलाह देते हैं। यदि किसी व्यक्ति के जीवन में अत्यधिक परेशानियां हो तथा कोई काम नहीं बन पा रहा है, आत्मविश्वास की कमी हो तो सुंदरकांड के पाठ से शुभ फल प्राप्त होता है।

Sunderkand, Sunderkand chaupai, sunderkand path, sunderkand full, sunderkand in hindi, सम्पूर्ण सुन्दरकाण्ड पाठ, Sampurn SunderKand, sunder kand, sunderkand ka path, sangeetmay sunderkand, sunderkand ramayan, Sunderkand fast, Sunderkand with lyrics, Sunder kand By Prem Parkash Dubey, Sunderkand live, Mangalwar Special, Kam samay main sunderkand, 45 min mein sunderkand, sunderkand in hindi, हनुमान जी का सुंदरकांड, रामायण का सुंदरकांड, संपूर्ण सुंदरकांड चौपाई, सुंदरकांड हिंदी में,सुंदरकांड डाउनलोड, Mangalwar special sunderkand, Tuesday special sunderkand, Tuesday speical, Sunderkand ka path kese karein, अब तक का सबसे कम समय मे गाया गया सम्पूर्ण सुन्दरकाण्ड पाठ, Sunderkand ki chaupaiya, sunderkand sunne ke labh,

snippet.title: Chitra Pournami Special Songs 🙏 | Arunachala Shiva Bhakti Songs | Sivan Tamil Bhakti Padalgal
snippet.description:
Chitra Pournami Special Songs 🙏 | Arunachala Shiva Bhakti Songs | Sivan Tamil Bhakti Padalgal

00:00 Shiva Suprabatham
08:45 Om Namah Shivaya Mantra
18:30 Sivan Potri 108
27:40 Lingashtakam
35:20 Thiruvempavai Paadalgal
44:10 Arunachala Shiva Padal


Celebrate the divine occasion of Chitra Pournami 🙏 with powerful Arunachala Shiva Bhakti Songs and soulful Sivan Tamil Bhakti Padalgal. This sacred full moon day is highly auspicious for worshipping Lord Shiva, especially Arunachaleswarar, and seeking blessings for spiritual growth, karma cleansing, and inner peace.

Immerse yourself in these devotional songs that elevate your mind, purify your soul, and bring divine vibrations into your home. Listening to Shiva bhakti songs on Pournami is believed to remove negative energies and grant peace, prosperity, and wisdom.

✨ Perfect for meditation, prayer, and spiritual connection on this holy day.
🙏 Om Namah Shivaya | Annamalaiyar Thunai

 
#ChitraPournami #ArunachalaShiva #OmNamahShivaya #ShivaSongs

snippet.title: Shyamal Sanware | Krishnavataram Part 1 | Sonu Nigam, Neeti Mohan, Irshad Kamil, Prasad S.
snippet.description:
Divine arrival: Krishnavataram’s Shyamal Sanware, where love becomes devotion, and devotion becomes eternal.

Releasing in theatres worldwide on May 7, 2026, in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu 

👉 Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
Song: Shyamal Sanware
Music Composer: Prasad S.
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil  
Vocals: Sonu Nigam, Neeti Mohan, Prasad S.

Directed by: Hardik Gajjar
Produced by: Sajan Raj Kurup, Shobha Sant
Produced by: Poonam Shroff, Parth Gajjar

Starring:  
Siddharth Gupta as Krishna  
Sanskruti Jayana as Satyabhama  
Sushmitha Bhat as Radha  
Nivaashiyni Krishnan as Rukmini

Choreography By: Kruti Mahesh

Music Produced and Arranged by: Prasad S.
Assistant to Prasad S.: Tushar J
Mix & Master: Shadab Rayeen, Asst. Jazbaat, Sohamm, Suryansh @New Edge Studios
Music Supervisor: Piush K Setth

Live Musicians:
Neeti Mohan & Sonu Nigam’s Vocals Recorded @Studio504 By Rahul Sharma, Ankesh Chandankhede Asst. By Priyank Tayal

Flute: PMK Naveen Kumar
Tutti Section: Yogesh More, Rajendra Salunkhe
Sitar: Sweekar Katti, Ravi Chary

Backing Vocals: Deepanshi Nagar, Ananya Sritam Nanda, Shikha Sonik, Dhanshree Rajvarsh, Sanjana Arun, Shailjaa Upadhyay, Rohini Garg, Diptanshu Tiwari, Shivam Singh, Santanu Dey Sarkar, Aman Jain

Rhythm Designed & Performed by: Krishna Kishor
Percussionists: K V Prasad, Rahul, Vicky
Tabla & Tarang: Ganpathi, Sriram
Recorded by: Lijesh Kumar

Screenplay by: Prakash Kapadia, Raam Mori & Hardik Gajjar  
Director of Photography: Ayananka Bose

Distributed Worldwide by AA Films

snippet.title: IYKYK | Athiradi | Tovino Thomas | Basil Joseph | Riya Shibu | Vishnu Vijay | Fejo | Poornima Kannan
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Malayalam

Presenting the first single "IYKYK" from 'Athiradi' starring Tovino Thomas, Basil Joseph, Zarin Shihab, Riya Shibu and others. Directed by Arun Anirudhan. Music Composed by Vishnu Vijay

Song Credits: 
Song: IYKYK
Singer: Fejo, Poornima Kannan
Lyrics: Suhail Koya
Music Composed, Arranged, Produced by Vishnu Vijay @ DRAVIDA STUDIOS, CHENNAI
Vocals Recorded @ DRAVIDA STUDIOS, CHENNAI
Studio Session Manager : Paul Renold
Artist Liaison & Distribution Manager: Poornima Kannan
Music Production Manager: Christy Thomas Cherian
Artist Session Manager: K D Vincent
Mixing & Mastering: Sujith Sreedhar @ The Masterhouse, 2bq studios, Chennai
Assisted by Amal Mithu
Sessions manager: Vignesh Raj
            
Video Credits: 
Directed By: Arun Anirudhan
Produced By: Dr. Ananthu S  &  Basil Joseph
Co-producers: Sameer Thahir, Tovino Thomas
Written By: Paulson Skaria, Arun Anirudhan
DOP: Samuel Henry
Editor: Chaman Chakko
Music Composer : Vishnu Vijay
Lyrics: Suhail Koya
Production Designer: Maanav Suresh
Costume Designer: Mashar Hamsa
Make Up: Ronex Xavier
Stunts: Action Sandhosh & Phoenix Prabu
Sound Designer: Nixon George
Production Controller: Antony Thomas
Art Director: Akhil Damodhar
Executive Producers: Nikhil Ramanath & Amal Xavier Manackatharayil
Sound Mix: Rajakrishnan MR
DI Colorist: Joyner Thomas
Additional Dialogues: Sonu Surendran
Finance Controller: Midhun K Varghese
VFX: Mindstein Studios
Chief Associate Directors: Suku Damodar, Sohil
Stills: Rohith K Suresh
Title Design: Sarcasanam
PRO: Vaisakh C Vadakkeveedu & Jinu Anilkumar
Publicity Designs: Yellowtooths
Digital Content: Dripwave Collective

Lyrics: 
Mizhi chaanthozhiche kuzhache
And she chirikondu nanache
Urache manasselurachoru 
Ghanayadi Anuraagam

Nejamaava? Cinemaava?
She is a sigmava ? Enigmava? 

If you know you know (IYKYK) chorus

Thedi nadannoru theneecha
Ini Sem aake neeya pareeksha
Aramani neram neeyum ente koode vanniri
Sundari Pimpiriye
So many aasha keri jet mele set 
Ini tell me prathividhi nin chiri chevikalil
Paattukalaaye.. 
Aa cute-ukalaaye.. 
My doodle-ye.. Njan Totallye.. Unusuallye.. 
Falling for you again again.

Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

To buy the original and virus free track, visit www.saregama.com
Follow us on: YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/Saregamamalayalam
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/Saregamamalayalam
X: https://twitter.com/saregamasouth​​

snippet.title: 90’S Old Hindi Songs 💘 Evergreen Sadabahar Songs 💘 Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik, 🥰 Hindi Jukebox Songs
snippet.description:
90’S Old Hindi Songs 💘 Evergreen Sadabahar Songs 💘 Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik, 🥰 Hindi Jukebox Songs का यह शानदार कलेक्शन आपको ले जाएगा पुराने सुनहरे दौर में। 🎶

इस वीडियो में आपको मिलेंगे दिल छू लेने वाले 70s, 80s और 90s के सुपरहिट गाने जो आज भी लोगों के दिलों में बसे हुए हैं। अगर आप भी Old Is Gold गानों के फैन हैं तो यह वीडियो आपके लिए परफेक्ट है। ❤️

✨ इस Playlist में शामिल हैं:

Romantic Evergreen Songs 💕
Sadabahar Hindi Songs 🥀
Old Bollywood Classics 🎬
90's Love Hits 💓

👉 अगर आपको पुराने गाने पसंद हैं तो वीडियो को Like 👍 करें, Share 🔄 करें और Channel को Subscribe जरूर करें।

Will Franklin & Shinchan survive this haunted island? Or will the horror cave trap them forever? 😨 Watch till the end for shocking twists and scary moments!

snippet.title: Tumsa Koi Pyaara - Khuddar (1994) | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Govinda, Karisma Kapoor
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Tumsa Koi Pyaara
Movie: Khuddar (1994)
Singer(s): Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Rahat Indori

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: N. R. Pachisia
Director: Iqbal Durrani
Cast: Govinda, Karisma Kapoor, Kader Khan, Shakti Kapoor

Song Lyrics:

Barsat Ka Mausam Yahan Hum Yahan Tum
Sajni Ko Milgaye Saajan Saajan Saajan
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum
Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakho Hai Magar Tumsa Yahan
Kaun Haseen Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakhon Hai Magar Tumsa Yaha Kaun Haseen Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhen Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Sau Phool Khile Jab Ye Khila Roop Sunhara
Sau Chand Bane Jab Ye Bana Chand Sa Chehra
Sau Phool Khile Jab Ye Khila Roop Sunhara
Sau Chand Bane Jab Ye Bana Chand Sa Chehra
Itna Bhi Koi Pyar Ki Raho Mein Ghoom Na Ho
Bas Hosh Hai Itna Mere Saath Mein Tum Ho
Mere Saath Me Tum Ho, Mere Saath Me Tum Ho
Dhadkan Hai Kahin Dil Hai Kahin Jaan Kahin Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Ye Chandani In Ankhon Ka Saya To Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Ye Hoth Ye Palke Ye Nighahe Ye Adaye
Miljaye Khuda Mujhko Toh Main Lelu Balaaye
Duniya Ka Koi Bhi Gham Mere Paas Na Hoga
Tum Saath Mein Chaloge Toh Ye Ehsaas Na Hoga
Ehsaas Na Hoga, Ehsaas Na Hoga
Akash Hai Pairon Mein Hamare Ke Zameen Hai
Tum Jan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Aisa Koi Mahbub Jamane Me Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakho Hai Magar Tumsa Yaha Kaun Hasi Hai
Tum Jan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

snippet.title: MY NEW GAMING BEAST
snippet.description:
MY NEW GAMING BEAST
#laptop  #ujjwal  #technogamerz  

I finally got my hands on my new ultimate gaming machine, and this one seriously delivers on both power and performance. Meet the Alienware 16X and Alienware 16, powered by the latest Intel Core Ultra HX processors and Intel Core Series 2, bringing next-level gaming, multitasking, and efficiency. In this video, I unbox, test, and push these machines to their limits—from AAA gaming to real-world usage—so you know exactly which one is worth it.

snippet.title: Pakad Lo Haath Banwari 🙏 Dil Chhoo Jane Wala Krishna Bhajan | Bhakti Mein Dubo Dene Wala
snippet.description:
🙏 Welcome to Soulful Serenity 🙏
"Jahan Bhakti milti hai Shakti se aur Mann ko milta hai Sukoon." 🌸

🎵 Song : - Pakad Lo Haath Banwari
🎤 Singer: - Bhumika Sharma 
✍️ Lyrics / Writer: - Traditional
🎼 Music: - 
🏢 Music Label / Company: - SK Entertainment
📀 Category: - Spiritual / Devotional Music

Is channel ka maksad sirf sangeet sunana nahi, balki aapko ishwar ke aur kareeb lana hai. Aaj ki is bhag-daur bhari zindagi mein, hum aksar apne mann ki shanti kho dete hain. Soulful Serenity ek aisi jagah hai jahan aapko milenge:

✨ Mann ko shanti dene wale Bhajans
✨ Sangeetmay Aarti aur Chalisa
✨ Dhyan aur Positivity bhare Mantras
✨ Rooh ko chhu lene wali Devotional Music

Har subah ek nayi ummeed aur bhakti ke saath shuru karein. Hamare parivaar ka hissa banne ke liye channel ko Subscribe zaroor karein aur ghanti (🔔) dabayein taaki koi bhi prarthana choot na jaye Krishna Bhajan, Shree Ram Bhajans, Mahadev Status, Mata Rani Ke Bhajan, Aarti Sangrah, Chalisa Path, Anmol Vachan Bhajan, Soulful Serenity, New Bhajan 2026, Morning Bhajan, Peaceful Music, [God ka naam] Bhajan, Bhakti Song Hindi New Bhajan 2026, Best Bhakti Songs, Peaceful Bhajans, Hindi Devotional Songs, Morning Prayers, Relaxation Music, Spiritual Songs.

#SoulfulSerenity #Bhajan #Bhakti #Devotional #MorningBhajan #Spiritual #Peaceful #Meditation #KrishnaBhajan #RamBhajan #ShivBhajan #Divine #Aarti #Bhajan2026 #suvichar 

Sada khush rahein, muskuraate rahein!

localized.description:
🙏 Welcome to Soulful Serenity 🙏
"Jahan Bhakti milti hai Shakti se aur Mann ko milta hai Sukoon." 🌸

🎵 Song : - Pakad Lo Haath Banwari
🎤 Singer: - Bhumika Sharma 
✍️ Lyrics / Writer: - Traditional
🎼 Music: - 
🏢 Music Label / Company: - SK Entertainment
📀 Category: - Spiritual / Devotional Music

Is channel ka maksad sirf sangeet sunana nahi, balki aapko ishwar ke aur kareeb lana hai. Aaj ki is bhag-daur bhari zindagi mein, hum aksar apne mann ki shanti kho dete hain. Soulful Serenity ek aisi jagah hai jahan aapko milenge:

✨ Mann ko shanti dene wale Bhajans
✨ Sangeetmay Aarti aur Chalisa
✨ Dhyan aur Positivity bhare Mantras
✨ Rooh ko chhu lene wali Devotional Music

Har subah ek nayi ummeed aur bhakti ke saath shuru karein. Hamare parivaar ka hissa banne ke liye channel ko Subscribe zaroor karein aur ghanti (🔔) dabayein taaki koi bhi prarthana choot na jaye Krishna Bhajan, Shree Ram Bhajans, Mahadev Status, Mata Rani Ke Bhajan, Aarti Sangrah, Chalisa Path, Anmol Vachan Bhajan, Soulful Serenity, New Bhajan 2026, Morning Bhajan, Peaceful Music, [God ka naam] Bhajan, Bhakti Song Hindi New Bhajan 2026, Best Bhakti Songs, Peaceful Bhajans, Hindi Devotional Songs, Morning Prayers, Relaxation Music, Spiritual Songs.

#SoulfulSerenity #Bhajan #Bhakti #Devotional #MorningBhajan #Spiritual #Peaceful #Meditation #KrishnaBhajan #RamBhajan #ShivBhajan #Divine #Aarti #Bhajan2026 #suvichar 

Sada khush rahein, muskuraate rahein!

snippet.title: Hi May Bhumi Hi Janma Bhumi Song | ही मायभूमी ही जन्मभूमी ही कर्मभूमी आमची | ही माय मराठी आमची कवायत
snippet.description:
Lyrical Video| Hi may Bhumi , Hi Janma Bhumi | ही मायभूमी , ही जन्मभूमी , ही कर्मभूमी अमुची

Song Lyrics:
ही मायभूमी, ही जन्मभूमी, ही कर्मभूमी अमुची..
 
ही मायभूमी, ही जन्मभूमी, ही कर्मभूमी अमुची

महवंदनीय, अति प्राणप्रिय, ही माय मराठी अमुची....

हा अमुचा आहे बाणा, ही अमुची आहे बोली,

अस्मानी झळके भव्य पताका, भगव्या जरीपटक्याची......



राकट देशा, कणखर देशा, दगडांच्या देशा,

प्रणाम घ्यावा माझा, हे श्री महाराष्ट्र देशा....

भीमा, वरदा, कृष्ण, कोयना भद्रा गोदावरी...

एकपणाचे भरती पाणी, मातीच्या घागरी....



योग्यांची अन संतांची, भक्तांची माळकऱ्यांची,

ही देव देश अन धर्मासाठी, प्राण वेचणाऱ्य़ांची....

योध्द्यांची अन वीरांची, तलवारीच्या पात्याची,

देशाचे रक्षण करण्यासाठी, जीव खर्चणाऱ्यांची....



ही भूमी सप्तसूरांची, रंगांची अष्टकलांची,

काव्याची, शास्त्रविनोदाची, ही भूमी साहित्याची....



महाराष्ट्र भूमी ही जन्मभूमी ही कर्मभूमी अमुची

महवंदनीय अति प्राणप्रिय ही माय मराठी अमुची....

Title - Hi May Bhumi Hi Janma Bhumi
Singer - Mahesh Hiremath
VFX - Vision Graphics
Label - Bhakti Vision Entertainment

#maharashtradin #maharashtradinsong #1stmay 

नमस्कार,
Vision भक्ती मराठी - या मराठी चॅनल वर आपले स्वागत आहे. 
या चॅनल वरती श्री गणेशाचे, श्री विठ्ठलाचे, स्वामी समर्थांचे, महादेवाचे, दत्तगुरूंचे, देवीचे, श्री हनुमान व इतर मराठी भक्तिगीते, स्तोत्र, अभंग, कीर्तन, आरती, मंत्र  या चॅनेल वरती प्रकाशित होतील..

video credit 

ritika queen

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

🎵 SONG Highlights
* Song:  নুপুৰৰ ৰুণজুন (Nupuror Runjun)
* Lyrics: Nabanita Chetia (Zunali)

* Singer: Digitally processed
* Studio: NADI Studio
* Medium: Digital
______________
📜 About this Video
In this video, we bring you a beautiful collection of Assamese Modern/Classical Music. Whether it is the rhythmic beats of the various modern/folk music instruments or the soothing melodies, these songs are a tribute to our rich cultural heritage.
📌 DISCLAIMER
This music is created entirely through digital production and sound design.
The video has been made various computerised graphic design system

This work is created with deep respect for Assamese Music, Assamese folk roots, village melodies, and real musicians who keep our traditional spirit alive

snippet.title: KANGULA - 4k Official Full Video l Sambeet Acharya, Anshuman l Aswin Tripathy @BABUBHAIPRODUCTION
snippet.description:
#kangulaodiafilm #babubhaiproduction #newodiasong


🎬 KANGULA – MAA KALI RA DANDA NACHA | OFFICIAL FULL VIDEO (4K)
🌺 In Cinemas Worldwide from 24th April 2026
When faith crosses limits…
When devotion transforms into शक्ति…
A divine force awakens beyond control.
Presenting the Official Full Video of KANGULA, a soul-stirring cinematic experience inspired by Odisha’s sacred Danda Nacha tradition — where pain becomes prayer, and devotion becomes शक्ति.
Rooted in the culture and soil of Odisha, powered by the fierce energy of Maa Kali, KANGULA brings a gripping tale of belief, sacrifice, mystery, and divine strength that echoes across generations.
This is not just a film…
This is a ritual.
This is the roar of faith.
🔱 The beats are louder.
🔥 The fire rises higher.
🌺 Maa Kali is here.
🎵 SONG CREDITS – "KANGULA"
Singer: Krishna Beuraa
Lyrics: Dr. Nirmal Nayak
Music: Baidyanath Dash
Music Arrangements: Abhishek Panigrahi
Recorded, Mixed & Mastered by Somesh Satpathy @ Somesh Studio
🎥 FILM CREDITS
Producer: Suvendra Kumar Malla (Litu) & Sambeet Acharya
Director: Aswin Tripathy
Line Producer: Subodha Mohapatra (Bubu)
Story: Sambeet Acharya
Screenplay & Dialogue: Amit Kumar Dash & Anil Barik
Music: Baidyanath Dash, J N Padma & Sumit Dixit
Background Music: Nabs & Saroj
Cinematography: Ishwar Barik
Editor: Manas Kumar Sahoo
Associate Editor: Debadatta Biswal
Colorist: P.V Manikumar
DI Studio: Cherry Pix, Kolkata
Voice Dubbing: Shakti Studio
Sound Designer: Jubin Raj
Sound Design Studio: SoundSmith Studio, Kerala
Choreographer: Firoz & Dibya
Styling: Prerna Pratikshya
Art Director: Sudhanshu Mohanty (Nilu)
Costume Partner: OAURA
Costume Man: Prabitra Mehena
Associate Director: Durllava
Assistant Directors: Joy, Shanti, Satyajeet
Production Manager: Sankar
Make Up: Sourav Lenka (Pupun)
Edit Studio: Pupul Films
Publicity Partner: IDOL ODISHA
Publicity Design: Blank Canvas RGF
Camera Equipment: Digital Dreams
Creative Visual: ATF Studio
Stills: Basudev Films
BTS Making: Sourav Nath
Visual Effects: Subrat
Promo GFX: The M Factor

🎬 KANGULA – MAA KALI RA DANDA NACHA | OFFICIAL FULL VIDEO (4K)
🌺 In Cinemas Worldwide from 24th April 2026
When faith crosses limits…
When devotion transforms into शक्ति…
A divine force awakens beyond control.
Presenting the Official Full Video of KANGULA, a soul-stirring cinematic experience inspired by Odisha’s sacred Danda Nacha tradition — where pain becomes prayer, and devotion becomes शक्ति.
Rooted in the culture and soil of Odisha, powered by the fierce energy of Maa Kali, KANGULA brings a gripping tale of belief, sacrifice, mystery, and divine strength that echoes across generations.
This is not just a film…
This is a ritual.
This is the roar of faith.
🔱 The beats are louder.
🔥 The fire rises higher.
🌺 Maa Kali is here.

snippet.title: जाने क्यों लोग मोहब्बत किया | Mehboob Ki Mehndi | Lata Mangeshkar Songs | Leena Chandavarkar
snippet.description:
Dil se nikle geet, jo aaj bhi dhadkano mein base hain… Welcome to a journey of love and longing with the unforgettable voice of Lata Mangeshkar. In this video, we celebrate the magic of 'Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya' from the movie Mehboob Ki Mehndi, a song that beautifully captures the complexities and emotions of love in the 1970s. Lataji's soulful rendition brings to life the poignant lyrics and melodies, creating an atmosphere of pure emotion. 



Credits :

Song: Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya
Album: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 


Lyrics :

is zamane me, is mohabat ne
kitne dil tode, kitne ghar phunke
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
dil ke badale darde dil liya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

Immerse yourself in the golden era of Bollywood music and let the timeless voice of Lata Mangeshkar touch your heart. Share your favorite Lata Mangeshkar song in the comments below! Like this video and subscribe to our channel for more classic melodies and unforgettable moments. 

Let the magic of music live on…

snippet.description:
💖 Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna | Heart Touching Romantic Song 2026 💖

Is khoobsurat gaane “Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna” mein mehsoos karein sacche pyaar ki gehraai ❤️ Yeh hindi song har us dil ke liye hai jise kabhi kisi se sachcha pyaar hua ho… chahe wo milan ho ya judai 💔

🎶 Soft music, emotional lyrics aur soulful vibes ke saath yeh romantic song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jayega. Jaise ek moonlight night mein ek lantern chamakta hai, waise hi yeh love story aapke dil ko roshan karegi.

snippet.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man - Salman Khan, Rani, Preity | Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik | Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
snippet.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" ke jaadu mein kho jaaiye, jo 2001 ki blockbuster film "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke" ka ek behtareen romantic track hai. Sonu Nigam aur Alka Yagnik ki awaaz mein ye gaana aaj bhi dilon ko chhu leta hai. Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee aur Preity Zinta ki chemistry aur Anu Malik ka sangeet ise ek evergreen hit banata hai.

Is nostalgic melody ko enjoy karein aur apne doston ke saath share karein!

Credits:

Singer(s): Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer
Cast: Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee, Preity Zinta
Director: Abbas-Mustan

Lyrics:

दीवाना है यह मन
क्यूँ पागल है धड़कन
क्यूँ तुझपे मुझे प्यार आया है
यह मौसम क्यूँ सजे
यह पायल क्यूँ बजे
यह कैसा खुमार छ्चाया है
कोई बता दे, कोई बता दे, कोई बताए ना
यह मैं जानूं या तू जाने
इस बात को कोई क्या जाने, ओह
दिल, तेरा मेरा दिल, झूमे रे झूमे
दिल, तेरा मेरा दिल, झूमे रे झूमे
मैने तेरी धड़कानों पे सनम
अपनी वफ़ा की कहानी लिखी
मैने तेरे नाम जाने जिगर
अपनी हसीन ज़िंदगानी लिखी
यह काजल क्यूँ हासे
यह नैना क्यूँ झुके
यह कैसा निकाह मुझपे आया है
कोई बता दे, कोई बता दे, कोई बताए ना
यह मैं जानूं या तू जाने
इस बात को कोई क्या जाने, हो
दिल, तेरा मेरा दिल, झूमे रे झूमे
दिल, तेरा मेरा दिल, झूमे रे झूमे
ओ मेरे रब्बा, तेरा शुक्रिया
जो मैने माँगा मुझे मिल गया
मेरी मोहब्बत असर कर गयी
ख्वाबों का माहेका चमन खिल गया
यह बंधन क्यूँ बँधे
यह रिश्ते क्यूँ जुड़े
यह मौसम क्या संदेसा लाया है
कोई बता दे, कोई बता दे, कोई बताए ना
यह मैं जानूं या तू जाने
इस बात को कोई क्या जाने
दीवाना है यह मन
क्यूँ पागल है धड़कन
क्यूँ तुझपे मुझे प्यार आया है
यह मौसम क्यूँ सजे
यह पायल क्यूँ बजे
यह कैसा खुमार छ्चाया है
कोई बता दे, कोई बता दे, कोई बताए ना
यह मैं जानूं या तू जाने
इस बात को कोई क्या जाने
दिल, तेरा मेरा दिल, झूमे रे झूमे
दिल, तेरा मेरा दिल, झूमे रे झूमे

(c) Universal Music India
